notifications.pushDescription: Get instant alerts when your order is approved, your withdrawal delivered or additional info is requested.
notifications.iosHint: Notifications work even when you close this tab. On iOS you need to add the site to your home screen from Safari (share icon → “Add to Home Screen”) and then enable notifications from the installed app.

language.label: Language
language.description: The interface switches instantly. Downloaded reports keep the language they were generated in.

language.label: Language
language.description: The interface switches instantly. Downloaded reports keep the language they were generated in.

defensiveMode.userBanner: Platform under security maintenance. Withdrawals and new registrations are temporarily suspended. Sorry for the inconvenience.

verificationGate.title: Complete your verification to {{action}}
verificationGate.subtitle: By AML/KYC regulation and to protect Resilience Brothers users, we require these 3 verifications before enabling operations. It'll only take a few minutes.
verificationGate.footer: Once you finish each step, this screen will automatically unlock the {{action}} form.

email.label: Verify email
email.hint: Confirm your email from the link we sent when you registered.

phone.label: Verify phone
phone.hint: A staff member must confirm your number. Contact support to speed it up.

kyc.label: Complete KYC
kyc.hint: Upload your ID and a selfie from the verification module.

exchange.title: Crypto ↔ Fiat
exchange.subtitleStandard: Standard rate based on your tier
exchange.uploadHint: Drop file here or click to browse (max 3MB)
exchange.noRatesYet: No rates configured for this pair yet.
exchange.destinationAccount: Destination account — send your payment here:
exchange.senderNameLabel: Account holder who sends the payment
exchange.senderNamePlaceholder: Full name of the sending account holder
exchange.senderNameHint: Required · recorded in the accounting proof and audit trail.
exchange.cashFiatExplainer: We do NOT handle fractional cash. If the calculation yields decimals, we deliver the WHOLE amount and the remainder is credited to YOUR {{code}} balance. You can accumulate it toward a whole amount or convert it to USDT from Balance & Withdrawals (fixed 0.01 USDT commission per conversion, min equivalent 1 USDT).
exchange.orderInReview: Your order #{{id}} is under review by our accounting team.
exchange.detailsHelperGeneric: Include all information required to process the payment.
exchange.accuracyWarning: Please make sure you enter the destination account details correctly. A numbering error may delay or divert the payment.

withdraw.title: Withdraw balance
withdraw.subtitle: Convert your accumulated balance into fiat/crypto.
withdraw.detailsHint: Bank + account, or address to deliver cash, or wallet address + network for crypto.
withdraw.totpHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
withdraw.successCreated: Withdrawal request submitted. Our team will contact you shortly.
withdraw.cashReceiverAddressPh: Street, number, cross streets, municipality, province
withdraw.cashReceiverIdPh: Only if the team requests it to coordinate
withdraw.networkMismatchHint: Check the selected network or paste another address —
withdraw.cashProgressNote: Cash pickup: will stay In progress until the team marks it Delivered.
withdraw.errReceiverName: Receiver name and surname are required
withdraw.errCryptoNetwork: Select the on-chain network of the withdrawal.
withdraw.err2FA: Enter your 2FA code (6 digits) or recovery code
withdraw.setupNeededToast: You must set up 2FA before withdrawing
withdraw.chooseCorrectNetwork: Choose the correct network. Sending on the wrong network may lose funds permanently.

vipView.title: Your accumulated balance
vipView.consolidatedNote: Consolidated equivalent of all your currencies · uses normal rate
vipView.emptyBalances: You have no accumulated balance yet. Create orders with delivery "Accumulate in balance".
vipView.clickToDrilldown: Click a currency to see the orders that credited it.
vipView.ledgerEmpty: No orders registered for this currency.
vipView.dailyClosingSub: Download the PDF report of your approved orders for the day.

orders.title: My Orders
orders.payoutProofTitle: Proof of the payment made to you
orders.payoutFooter: This is the evidence of the payment made by Resilience Brothers to your account/wallet.

0.title: Crypto ↔ Fiat without borders
0.body: Swap USDT, BTC and other cryptos for dollars, euros and pesos. You upload a proof, we confirm in minutes.

1.title: Your VIP balance, in any currency
1.body: Each operation adds to your multi-currency balance. Withdraw whenever you like or use it to redeem products.

2.title: Real merchandise with your balance
2.body: Rice, flour, oil, drinks and more. Turn your digital balance into physical products without going through banks.

appeal.dialogDescription: Write why you believe your account should be reactivated. The staff will read your message and respond as soon as possible. Be clear and provide context (e.g. correct number, apparent reason for the block).
appeal.textareaPlaceholder: e.g. My phone is correct and does not match the blocked list; I can verify by WhatsApp.
appeal.alreadyPendingBanner: You already have a pending appeal. Staff is reviewing it. Wait for the response before sending another.
appeal.historyEmpty: You haven't sent any appeal yet.
appeal.errTooShort: Tell us in more detail (minimum 10 characters).
appeal.successToast: Appeal sent. Staff will review it soon.
appeal.errAlreadyPending: You already have a pending appeal. Wait for the staff's response.

profile.title: Personal data

email.codeSent: Code sent. Check your new email.

phone.requestSent: Request submitted. Wait for team approval.

country.resetsKyc: Country updated. Your KYC was reset to 'under review'.

profile.headerBody: All the data you registered with. You can update them if you change country, phone or email — we only require additional verification to protect your account.
profile.kycHelperBody: Upload your documents to unlock higher limits and operate without friction. Review usually takes 30 min to 24 h.
profile.securityHelperBody: Manage your two-factor authentication, change your password and view active sessions.

marketplace.title: Redeem your balance
marketplace.subtitle: Turn your USD balance into products with home delivery.
marketplace.empty: No products available yet — check back soon.

kyc.title: Verify your identity (KYC)
kyc.subtitle: Upload your ID and a selfie. Approval takes minutes.
kyc.uploadHint: PNG or JPG, max 5MB. Make sure the image is clear.
kyc.successSubmitted: Verification submitted. We'll notify you when it's reviewed.
kyc.subtitle: Upload 3 photos to verify your identity. Your documents are stored encrypted and only the review team can view them.
kyc.canResubmit: You can resubmit the verification with new documents below.
kyc.contactSupport: Contact the team from the support chat with the requested info.
kyc.successToast: Verification submitted. Our team will review it within ≤48h.
kyc.pendingMessage: Your verification is being reviewed. You'll receive a notification when there's an answer.
kyc.verifiedMessage: Your identity is verified ✓ — you can operate without reduced limits.

id_front.label: Front of document
id_front.hint: Clear photo of the front side of your national ID / DNI / passport. Name and number must be readable.

id_back.label: Back of document
id_back.hint: Photo of the back side. If it's a passport, re-upload the photo page.

selfie.label: Selfie with document
selfie.hint: Photo of yourself holding the document next to your face. Good lighting, no filters.

dashboard.accountStandard: Standard Account · Rate based on your tier

hero.descriptionA: Resilience Brothers connects businesses and clients through a global P2P trading platform. Exchange digital assets, goods, products and services with integrated financial tooling for operations that are
hero.emailFallback: Google blocked in your region? Use <1>email access</1> — instant signup, no third parties.

about.title: An operational bridge between markets.
about.description: We run as financial infrastructure for clients who need to move value between crypto, fiat and physical goods — without slow banks or opaque fees.
about.globalDescription: Cuba, Brazil, Mexico and more. We deliver in local currency —CUP, BRL, MXN— via transfer or cash, with verified counterparties in every country.
about.proofsDescription: Every transaction requires proof with the account holder name. Our accounting team confirms funds before release.
about.settlementDescription: Approved operations settle in hours, not days.
about.dynamicRatesDescription: Our admins update crypto/fiat rates in real time. VIPs receive preferential pricing.
about.goodsDescription: Redeem your VIP balance for containers of rice, flour, drinks and more.

services.title: Two platforms. One flow.
services.cryptoDescription: Trade USDT, BTC and more for US dollars (Zelle), Cuban pesos, Brazilian reals or Mexican pesos.
cryptoBullets: Human confirmation by our accounting team
Delivery via transfer, cash or crypto
services.marketplaceDescription: Redeem your accumulated VIP balance for goods: rice, flour, drinks, oil and more.
marketplaceBullets: No commission, no courier fees for VIPs

steps.d: Pick the crypto/fiat pair, enter the amount and verify your rate.
A screenshot of the transfer showing the account holder name.
Our accounting team confirms the incoming payment.
Transfer, cash, crypto — or accumulate into VIP balance.

vipSection.title: Built for high volume.
vipSection.descriptionA: If you have your own clients and process multiple daily trades, the Resilience Brothers VIP program removes the friction:
vipSection.descriptionHighlight: no commission, preferential rates, accumulated balance
vipSection.descriptionB: plus the option to redeem for physical goods.

cta.title: Ready to scale your operation?
cta.subtitle: One account. Full access. No banking friction.
